name: @gtcx/compliance-data
description: Cryptographically signed catalog of African fintech regulatory jurisdiction data — 11 jurisdictions covering 22+ countries

scripts.typecheck: echo "No TypeScript files — typecheck is a no-op for this JS-only package"
scripts.build: echo "No build step required — this package runs directly with Node.js ESM"

_publishingNote: Set private:false when ready to npm publish. prepublishOnly runs the signature verifier to refuse publication of an unsigned or tampered catalog.
